# WheyIndex - Protein Price & Nutrition Analysis App

> WheyIndex helps users find the most cost-effective protein products by scraping data from Amazon, analyzing nutritional information using AI, and calculating key metrics like price per gram of protein.

This application follows a multi-stage process:
- Product data is scraped from Amazon using Python scripts
- Nutrition information is extracted from product images using the Anthropic API
- The processed data is stored in a SQLite database
- This Next.js web application provides a user interface to search, filter, and compare products

## Core Documentation

- [System Overview](https://www.wheyindex.com/what-is-wheyindex.com): Overview of the application's architecture and functionality
- [Brand Facts](https://www.wheyindex.com/brand-facts): Canonical facts about WheyIndex and key policies
- [Product Comparison](https://www.wheyindex.com): The main interface for comparing protein products
